address: Five-Nine, Kingsbury Ave, University City, MO 63130
description:
GUT-RENOVATED & FULLY FURNISHED

FIVE-NINE is the quintessential WashU off-campus apartment building. The building features four 3-bedroom apartments (12 beds total). Find your Kingsbury address complete with a 6-foot fenced backyard, picnic table, hammock, and fire pit.

INCLUDED FURNITURE — (3) Beds · (3) Mattresses · (3) Dressers · (3) Desks with Chairs · (1) Couch · (1) Coffee Table · (1) End Table · (1) TV Cabinet · (1) Dining Table with (4) Chairs · (3) Bar Stools

IN-UNIT FREE LAUNDRY — Say goodbye to the coins and the dark, dingy basement. Say hello to modern convenience and a full wardrobe.

MODERN KITCHEN — Black Pearl Granite Countertops, Large Breakfast Bar, and Stainless-Steel Appliances, including a Dishwasher and Microwave. The dining table right off the kitchen is the perfect place to host your next dinner party.

MODERN BATHROOM — New Porcelain Tile, Plumbing, Fixtures, and High-Pressure Rain Shower.

HARDWOOD FLOORS — Most new construction these days pass off cheap vinyl floors with wood prints as luxury. We stay true to our historic neighborhood and build with natural materials whenever possible.

CENTRAL HEAT/AC & NEW INSULATED WINDOWS — Stay comfortable throughout the year. We rebuilt this historic building from the inside out to modern standards of comfort.

Experience life in one of St. Louis's most historic buildings, the once coveted Delmonte Theater & Hotel. This urban retreat features a completely re-envisioned modern design around stunning historic architecture. Studio–2BR units available, including unique street-level loft apartments.

Echo is a historic gem built in 1926 and added to the National Register of Historic Places in 2005. Thoughtfully designed 1- and 2-bedroom apartment homes with garage parking, fitness center, and on-site management. Pet friendly.

address: 625 N. Euclid Ave, St. Louis, MO 63108
description: Boutique apartment residence offering studio and two-bedroom loft-style apartments with soaring ceilings and exposed brick. Amenities include hot tub & steam room, clubroom & lounge, fitness center, and garage parking.

Terra at the Grove is an urban oasis for those who love the city and the outdoors. Modern studio, 1-, and 2-bedroom apartment homes with in-unit laundry, a 52,000 sqft courtyard, resort-style pool, fitness & yoga studio, and garage parking.
3-bedroom, 2-bath apartment managed by STL Rental Services. Secure building with off-street parking and in-unit laundry.
